indication: Alecensa as monotherapy is indicated for the first-line treatment of adult patients with anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC).
description: The European Medicines Agency (EMA) has authorized alectinib as a monotherapy for the first-line treatment of adult patients with anaplastic lymphoma kinase (ALK)-positive advanced non-small cell lung cancer (NSCLC).

document.name: Alecensa (alectinib) [product information]. EMA.
document.description: Roche Registration GmbH. Alecensa (alectinib) [product information]. European Medicines Agency website. https://www.ema.europa.eu/en/documents/product-information/alecensa-epar-product-information_en.pdf. Revised June 2024. Accessed October 18, 2024.
